title: Weekly Sprint Plan
summary: Weekly sprint plan for April 14 -- ship 4 small stories, start OB-1/OB-3, dry-run the release pipeline, push RT-4 investigation to a documented finding by Friday.
contextSummary: All 26 stories were in Ready state. CTO took RT-4 ownership on Apr 13. CFO flagged effective CAC of $223 -- activation and retention are survival metrics. CEO watching P1 velocity as leading indicator. No releases have shipped from this backlog yet.
